svg.title: Debug platform system flowchart
svg.desc: Step-by-step flowchart of the Debug bug bounty report lifecycle: from organization creating a bounty, through duplicate checking and AI triage, to org review and smart contract payout or rejection.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does an organization start a bounty in Debug?')
sendPrompt('What parameters does an org define when creating a bounty?')
sendPrompt('How does the escrow smart contract lock ETH in Debug?')
sendPrompt('What does bounty active state mean in Debug?')
sendPrompt('How does a researcher submit a PoC report in Debug?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a duplicate report is detected in Debug?')
sendPrompt('How are researchers notified of rejection in Debug?')
sendPrompt('How does Gemini parse and score a vulnerability report?')
sendPrompt('How does Gemini generate remediation advice?')
sendPrompt('How does the approveAndPay function work in the escrow contract?')
